title: Dimensional Modelling Structure: Star Schema
description: A visual representation of a Star Schema, the core structure in Dimensional Modelling, showing a central fact table connected to surrounding dimension tables.
relationships: The Fact Table contains foreign keys that connect to the primary keys in each Dimension Table
The Fact Table holds quantitative data (measures) like sales amount or quantity sold
Each Dimension table contains descriptive attributes (like product name, customer address, day of week) that contextualize the facts
